mapper.select: SELECT ROD_GRADE, BOBBER_GRADE FROM TBOT_S4_USER_EQUIP WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName}
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TBOT_S4_USER_EQUIP T USING (SELECT #{userName} AS U FROM DUAL) S ON (T.USER_NAME = S.U) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_NAME, ROD_GRADE, BOBBER_GRADE, REG_DATE) VALUES (#{userName}, #{rodGrade}, #{bobberGrade}, SYSDATE)
INSERT INTO TBOT_S4_FISHING_LOG (USER_NAME, FISHING_DATE, FISH_ID, INSERT_DATE) VALUES (#{userName}, TRUNC(SYSDATE), #{fishId}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT FISH_ID, FISH_NAME, FISH_GRADE, WEIGHT FROM TBOT_S4_FISH_INFO WHERE FISH_GRADE = #{grade} AND ACTIVE_YN = '1'
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TBOT_S4_FISH_INV T USING (SELECT #{userName} AS U, #{fishId} AS F FROM DUAL) S ON (T.USER_NAME = S.U AND T.FISH_ID = S.F) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET QTY = QTY + 1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_NAME, FISH_ID, QTY, FIRST_CATCH_DATE) VALUES (#{userName}, #{fishId}, 1, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT I.FISH_ID, F.FISH_NAME, F.FISH_GRADE, I.QTY, TO_CHAR(I.FIRST_CATCH_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FIRST_CATCH_DATE FROM TBOT_S4_FISH_INV I JOIN TBOT_S4_FISH_INFO F ON I.FISH_ID = F.FISH_ID WHERE I.USER_NAME = #{userName} ORDER BY F.FISH_GRADE, F.FISH_NAME
SELECT ACH_ID, ACH_NAME, ACH_DESC, ACH_TYPE, ACH_PARAM, REWARD_TYPE, REWARD_GRADE FROM TBOT_S4_ACHIEVEMENT ORDER BY ACH_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBOT_S4_USER_ACH (USER_NAME, ACH_ID, CLEAR_DATE) VALUES (#{userName}, #{achId}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT I.FISH_ID) FROM TBOT_S4_FISH_INV I JOIN TBOT_S4_FISH_INFO F ON I.FISH_ID = F.FISH_ID WHERE I.USER_NAME = #{userName} AND F.FISH_GRADE = #{grade}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBOT_S4_FISH_INFO WHERE FISH_GRADE = #{grade} AND ACTIVE_YN = '1'
